offer: For restaurant managers processing 10-20 orders/week, inaccurate stock levels cause late orders. We provide inventory management instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate stock levels leading to late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums where restaurant managers share tools
try_it: Let users try real-time stock tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
